authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(31) — Corralitos Creek (Santa Cruz Co.)
sources.quotedText: (31) Corralitos Creek (Santa Cruz Co.) from mouth to Browns Valley Road. Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days. Only barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Open only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and the opening and closing days of the season; closed on all other days within the date range.

regulations.humanSummary: Open December 1 through March 7, but only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and the opening and closing days
regulations.verbatimText: Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days.

parameters.note: Open only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and the opening and closing days of the Dec. 1 - Mar. 7 season; closed to fishing on all other days during that period.

regulations.humanSummary: Fishing permitted only on Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays, and season opening/closing days
regulations.verbatimText: Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days.

parameters.note: Only barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Limit applies to hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead combined (denoted ** in the CDFW table, indicating hatchery-origin fish).

regulations.humanSummary: Daily bag limit 2, possession limit 4, hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead combined
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Also subject to Low-Flow Fishing Closure provisions of 14 CCR §8.00(c); fishing may be closed when stream flow drops below the threshold specified for this water.

regulations.humanSummary: Subject to Section 8.00(c) low-flow fishing closure restrictions

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
